text: Hi, my name is E. David Crawford, and during the next few minutes, I would like to review with you a technique that we have developed called the anatomic radical prostatectomy.

There are two buttons on the ThunderBeat.
The first one is the purple button, which combines both technologies, so we get effective coagulation and cutting.
And then if you want coagulation alone, the bipolar radio frequency is activated by the blue button.
